addons.name: 加訂溫哥華酒店（Accent Inns）
addons.description: The price is for one room per night, Accent Inns Vancouver Airport or similar. The actual hotel stay depends on the hotel where the group stays.

addons.name: 加訂溫哥華酒店（Hampton Inn）
addons.description: The price is for one room per night, breakfast included, Hampton Inn by Hilton Vancouver Airport or similar. The actual hotel stay depends on the hotel where the group stays.

addons.description: Transfer with surcharge: USD$50 / CAD$60 single trip.
